_readme: sound    → path to .mp3 or .aiff (relative paths resolve from this directory)
video_url→ YouTube or any URL — opened in your default browser
messages → pool of strings; one is picked at random each time
probability → 0.0–1.0 chance the alert fires at all (great for noisy events)
enabled  → false to silence an event entirely
Drop .mp3/.aiff files in the sounds/ folder and point sound keys at them.

UserPromptSubmit.title: 🏀 Chef Curry
messages: Chef Curry in the kitchen — cookin' something up 👨‍🍳
Steph caught the inbound. No defender in sight.
Ball is in Curry's hands. Uh oh.
30 feet from the basket... he's thinking about it 👀
The Splash Brother has entered the building 💦
Curry dribbles through his legs twice. Just vibing.
Warriors ball. Draymond yells something. Steph nods.

PreToolUse_Write.title: 🎯 Pulling Up
messages: STEP BACK… pulling up from the logo! 🎯
30-footer with a hand in his face. He doesn't care.
Zero hesitation. That's criminal.
He's cooking with gas now 🔥
Launching the {tool}. This is not a drill.
Steph just casually rewrites the playbook ✍️

PreToolUse_Bash.title: 💨 Fast Break
messages: Coast to coast — nothing can stop this man 💨
Running the fast break! Warriors ball!
Steph in transition. No one's catching him.
Full-court sprint, defender 10 feet behind 🏃
Shell command? Steph drops the hammer.

PreToolUse_Read.title: 📼 Scouting
messages: Watching film on the opponent 📼
Scouting the defense before making a move
Curry reads the floor. He already knows where this is going.
Studying the playbook like it's Game 7

PreToolUse_Web.title: 🔭 Googling
messages: Steph Googling: 'how to shoot 40% from half court' 🔭
Searching the web like he searches for open looks — relentlessly
Web search initiated. He's done his homework.
Google is Steph's second home. Stack Overflow is his third.

PreToolUse_Other.title: 🏀 Tool Time
messages: Curry makes a move you didn't see coming — {tool}
Using {tool}. Classic Curry improvisation.
Steph goes off-script. Again.

Notification_Permission.title: ⏱️ TIMEOUT
messages: TIMEOUT called! Ref needs a word with you 🛑
Draymond got T'd up again — your approval required 😬
Play is stopped. Coach is waiving you over 📋
The ref blew the whistle. Something needs your OK.
Technical foul incoming unless you intervene 🦺

Notification.title: 📣 Hey
messages: Claude is waving at you from half court 👋
Something just happened. Steph noticed.
Claude taps the court floor respectfully 🙏

Stop.title: 🙏 Night Night
messages: Night Night. 🙏 *tucks in keyboard*
Final buzzer sounds. That's a wrap. 🔔
73-9. See you tomorrow. 💪
Curry waves goodnight to the crowd 👋
Steph heads to the locker room. Another masterpiece.
Session over. Warriors win. As expected.
